name: anaconda-qa-assessment
description: QA Automation Engineer skills demonstration – Playwright UI challenge

scripts.test:api: playwright test tests/api/ && npm run allure:report
scripts.test:dev: ENV=development playwright test && npm run allure:report
scripts.test:staging: ENV=staging playwright test && npm run allure:report
scripts.test:prod: ENV=production playwright test && npm run allure:report
scripts.test:with-server: start npm start && wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run test:smoke
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.docker:smoke: docker run --rm playwright-tests npm run test:smoke
